message:
🌱 Add oauth2-proxy: Group/Role Access Restriction support in `/oauth2/auth` mission (#958)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "oauth2-proxy-831-group-role-access-restriction-support-in-oauth2-auth-endpoint",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "oauth2-proxy: Group/Role Access Restriction support in `/oauth2/auth` endpoint",
+    "description": "Group/Role Access Restriction support in `/oauth2/auth` endpoint. Requested by 11+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current oauth2-proxy deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your oauth2-proxy version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oauth2-proxy\nhelm list -n oauth2-proxy 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working oauth2-proxy installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review oauth2-proxy configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant oauth2-proxy configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oauth2-proxy\nkubectl get configmap -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=oauth2-proxy\n```\nWould simplify the deployment of a central Access Proxy for Kubernetes ingresses -- instead of having to support multiple with different OIDC apps that have different RBAC controls managed at that layer."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Group/Role Access Restriction support in `/oauth2/auth`…",
+        "description": "Begin to streamline Auth\n```yaml\nnginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/auth-signin: https://access-proxy.example.internal/oauth2/start?rd=https%3A%2F%2F$host$escaped_request_uri\nnginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/auth-url: https://access-proxy.example.svc.cluster.local/oauth2/auth\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oauth2-proxy\nkubectl get events -n oauth2-proxy --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Group/Role Access Restriction support in `/oauth2/auth`…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy/pull/797",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/auth-signin: https://access-proxy.example.internal/oauth2/start?rd=https%3A%2F%2F$host$escaped_request_uri\nnginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/auth-url: https://access-proxy.example.svc.cluster.local/oauth2/auth"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "oauth2-proxy",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "oauth2-proxy"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Deployment",
+      "Ingress",
+      "Role"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy/issues/831",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy/pull/797"
+    },
+    "reactions": 11,
+    "comments": 11,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with oauth2-proxy installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:39:40.522Z",

+  }
+}
